name: CXyz Comics Hero Legend Arthur
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＣＸ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオスエクシーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＣＨ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コミックヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>レジェンド・アーサー
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Ekushīzu Komikku Hīro Rejendo Āsā
name_jp_tl: Chaos Xyz: Comic Hero Legend Arthur
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
Once per turn, this card cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card has "Comics Hero King Arthur" as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● When this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; banish the destroyed monster, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its original ATK.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
